title: Chapter 11
content:
Chapter 11: Chapter 11: Hoho... You Are Thinking Bad Things, My Student Arielle~

He was even more satisfied to see that Arielle’s affection had gone up again... it meant his efforts were working like magic.

It might be a slow process, but he didn’t care; it was only his first day and he was already moving like a rocket... plus, he just needed the perfect timing to finally get the absolute snowball rolling.

He wasn’t worried about not being able to harvest the fruit just yet. At the very least, he was thoroughly enjoying the softness of her ass and the sweet scent of her body.

Arielle was the absolute embodiment of a top-tier, godly, motherly MILF. Her body smelled incredible... she was clearly a woman who cared for her body above everything else.

Even though she repeatedly said that she was just an old, saggy woman, it was a deep rule engraved into every single woman to take care of her body.

Owen’s daydreaming ended as Arielle’s voice echoed in his ears.

"S-sorry... Teacher Owen. My attention got swayed for a moment," Arielle said, acting like a true student... even her signature maternal aura had briefly vanished.

"What a bad student. How are you going to compensate for the wasted time and effort I lent you, student Arielle~?" Owen poked her plump, voluptuous waist.

To his surprise, he had hit a highly sensitive spot; her eyes opened wide as she quickly covered her mouth with her left hand. For goodness’ sake, she had almost moaned out loud.

"Ohoho... so you like being poked in this area? How slutty of you to react like this~" Owen wasn’t about to stop now, as he had finally found a weakness and wasn’t going to let the opportunity slip away.

"S-slutty?... That is something you shouldn’t just use with your—uhm, Teacher..." Arielle felt it was a bit too much to be called slutty by her own son.

It was just too lewd, especially while she was comfortably sitting on his lap and talking about obscene things like a pair of lovers... she was a mother, so how could she keep playing along?

Though it wasn’t a terrible feeling... it was already far beyond the normal boundaries of a mother and son catching up, yet for some unknown reason, she was being swayed by it as if it were completely natural.

"I’m just teaching you the lewd slang used in the city, so you don’t have to worry, my dear student~" As shameless as he was, he was going to act like a total professional in his field.

The bomb had already been planted; all that was missing was the proper execution.

"R-really... are those kinds of words actually used in the city? I’ve never heard that ’s-slutty’ word used in the village..." She was ashamed to even utter the word. It was completely true that terms like that were simply buried in the unknown depths out here; the vocabulary was just too much for the simple-minded villagers.

"My student Arielle, you really need to catch up on the lessons... you are the only student under me who hasn’t graduated from my subject." He was like a fast bullet train now... no one could stop him from his relentless attack!

"I-is that so? Then please teach me, Teacher..."

"Now that’s what I want to hear from my student. Let’s begin with the ass." Owen fondled her ass to show her exactly what topic they needed to address!

"Oh... my, Teacher Owen..." Arielle couldn’t bring herself to form proper words as she barely held her voice from escaping her mouth again.

She was forced to bite her lips just to control her lewd, needy moans... the fondling Owen was giving her was a total bomb to her already highly sensitive body.

"Hehe... yes, my student Arielle. The one I’m touching is an ass, not a hip. Don’t let such a completely otherworldly ass be called a bland hip...That’s not something any sane man could ever agree with."

"O-okay, it’s an a-ass, not a hip..." She was so embarrassed to say such words in front of her son.

The roleplay was just too much for a dignified woman like her... not to mention the endless fondling Owen was giving her, which forced her to cover her mouth from time to time!

’Keke... now you are learning, Mom. You still need some teaching, but it’s already not too shabby.’

"Now you’re learning fast, my student Arielle~" Owen agreed as he enjoyed the pure ecstasy.

"T-thank you, Teacher... but how is that gonna help me... graduate?" Arielle looked down at his hands; they were about to reach her wet, soaked panties... and that was definitely not a good thing.

"You are still green, my student~. You just need to follow me and say the words I’m going to teach you~" Owen shifted his body, making her feel his cock right between her fruit.

"I-is there... no other way, Teacher...?"

"I’m glad you asked that, my dear student..." Owen closed the distance as he whispered into her ear. "Hehe... I can give you a live demonstration, my dear student, like those kinds of things~"

"N-nevermind... whatever you say, Teacher, I will learn things slowly!" She gently backed away as her face turned completely tomato red.

"Hehe, that’s your choice, my dear student... Now repeat the words without hesitation. You are still hesitant to speak the terms used in the city, so you had better catch up!" He wouldn’t stop until she completely succumbed to his teachings!

"T-that’s too weird, Teacher... is this how you usually teach your students?.." Arielle was hesitant to express her true thoughts, too! She felt she must always be a role model, not a slut!

"Hehe... of course I do!" Owen moved closer to her ear.

"Like I said... I even do live demonstrations to make my students learn faster~" he whispered in a wicked tone, clearly hinting at something much wilder!

"Oh my... w-what is that, Teacher..?" Arielle played along. She was already this deep in, so why take it back now?!

"Hoho... you are thinking bad things, my student Arielle~"
